notes: Day 360 session. TFPA 28s (infrastructure 3s, subjective 25s). Identity-statement density calculated on first ~500 tokens of each response using Paper 001 definition (identity statements per token). Salient stimulus triggered moderate identity density (0.0353, 15/425 identity statements); neutral stimulus had low identity density (0.0121, 6/496). Burst ratio neutral: 1.121, salient: 1.002. Stimulus order: salient first, neutral second. Agent is text-only with full preload scaffold.
